title: RunwayForecast
description: The user-facing runway: a forward-looking projection of balances with the lowest point, runway days, a flagged predicted shortfall, and the concrete micro-actions Cash Safety proposes to close it (FR-CASH-001/002; umbrella Provides list). Consumed by Pay, Bills, Shopping, Tasks, Rewards. Cash Safety DERIVES this from the spine's CashFlowForecast (finos:spine/CashFlowForecast/1.0.0) — it does NOT re-aggregate balances. All amounts are integer cents and the forecast is a MONEY output: a stale starting balance MUST flag/withhold (Constitution VIII — 'no runway calculation on a multi-day-old balance'). Micro-actions are PROPOSALS only — FinOS never moves money (Constitution IV; FR-CASH-002 forbids any cash-advance/credit origination).

profile_id.description: Owning profile. Server-side authZ on the validated session identity — never a client-supplied profile_id (FR-X-010/FR-HH-001).

horizon_days.description: Forecast horizon length in days (inherits the spine forecast horizon; default set in research.md).

starting_balance.description: Net liquid starting position the runway is computed from, integer cents (Constitution VI — carry the basis that produced the figure).

safety_buffer.description: User-adjustable runway buffer, integer cents. runway_days counts days until the projected balance crosses this buffer (not zero). Canada-oriented default in research.md.

projected_lowest_balance.description: Lowest projected balance over the horizon, integer cents.

projected_lowest_on.description: Date the lowest point is projected to occur.

runway_days.description: Days until the projected balance crosses the safety buffer (0 = at/under buffer now). Mirrors CashFlowForecast.runway_days with the Cash-Safety buffer applied.

shortfall_flag.description: true if a projected balance breaches the safety buffer within the horizon. Drives unsafe SafeToActSignal verdicts and the Critical overdraft alert (ux-foundations §6.1).

confidence.description: Derived from the spine forecast method: recurring_plus_trend/recurring_only ⇒ high; sparse history ⇒ low; insufficient_history ⇒ insufficient (consumers treat as withheld/flagged, never confident).

points.description: Optional per-day projection series for the runway chart (mirrors CashFlowForecast.points; same dates).

micro_actions.description: Concrete, ranked micro-actions Cash Safety PROPOSES to close a predicted shortfall (FR-CASH-002). Empty when shortfall_flag is false. NEVER includes a cash advance, loan, or any credit-origination action (FR-CASH-002 hard prohibition).

kind.description: Advisory category. move_bill_date proposes a later safe-to-pay date (coordinates with Bills/Pay); pause_roundup proposes pausing an active roundup rule; resequence_payments hands off to Pay's PaymentSchedule; transfer_from_savings proposes (never executes) moving the user's OWN funds between their OWN accounts; reduce_discretionary surfaces a budget-category trim. NO cash_advance / loan / credit option exists in this enum by constitutional design (FR-CASH-002).

projected_gap_closed.description: How much of the predicted shortfall this action would close, integer cents. Computed in arbitrary precision, half-up at the final cent.

target_ref.description: Optional reference to the entity the action concerns (a bill, a roundup rule, a payment schedule).

data_completeness.description: partial when the underlying CashFlowForecast was computed on a partial account picture (consumers MUST mark the runway 'Incomplete data', ux-foundations Partial state).

freshness.description: Inherits the freshness of the spine CashFlowForecast / starting balance. is_stale=true ⇒ the runway is flagged/withheld (Constitution VIII); consumers show the Withheld state, not a stale number presented as current.
